JURY TRIAL CONT-JUDGE:CHARLENE P. MITCHELL; REPORTER: NORMA REAY; CLERK: LINDA ESPY; WITNESSES S/E, DOC EVID INTROD, COURT DENIED DEFT'S ORAL MOTION FOR CONT. APPEARANCES: MICHAEL ROSSOF, COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF, AND DEFENDANT IN PRO PER. CONT TRIAL TO 1/16/01, 9AM (DEPT606)

JUDGE: CHARLENE PADOVANI-MITCHELL/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR: DEBORAH NEVILLE C/C FOR CONTINUED TRIAL. PRESENT: PLAINTIFF & COUNSEL. DEFT GRETCHEN ANDERSON NOT PRESENT. JURY & ALTERNATE ALL PRESENT. (PER TELEPHONE CALL ON COURT'S VOICE MAIL, DEFT WAS TAKEN TO THE HOSPITAL, AFTER A 911 CALL.TRANSCRIPT OF THE CALL TAKEN BY REPORTER -ON LAPTOP- WAS READ BY COURT FROM THE LAPTOP) PLFF MOVED THE COURT NOT TO CONTINUE THE CASE AND A MOTION FOR A DIRECTED VERDICT. MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE - NOT GRANTED. MOTION FOR DIRECTED VERDICT - GRANTED. AFTER CASE DISPOSED, JURY CALLED TO THE COURTROOM. COURT INFORMED JURY CASE RESOLVED. JURY EXCUSED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, GRETCHEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3320 TARAVAL STREET, #6 $1,095.53 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,095.53, LEASE FORFEITED
